goal: Screenshot this page. As a senior product designer, rate it /10. One-line verdict + one thing to improve. Dark SaaS dashboard.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark SaaS dashboard 'Shielded Pool' page out of 10. Consider: visual hierarchy, navigation clarity, active state indicators, empty state design, color contrast, typography, spacing, and overall professional polish. Provide specific observations about what works and what needs improvement.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a detailed design evaluation of the Shielded Pool page covering visual hierarchy, navigation, typography, spacing, and areas for improvement, which I can then synthesize into a rating/10 and one concrete improvement recommendation.
